text:
Lonely Sapphire (孤独なサファイヤ) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Lonely Sapphire 孤独なサファイヤ - This card allows the user to summon forth a Lonely Sapphire. The owner of this rare jewel will acquire a vast amount of wealth. As a result, however, the owner must live with the curse of being alone for the rest of their life. They will be forsaken by all their friends, family, and anyone else who holds some significant value in their life.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.078 :: 孤独なサファイヤ 
このサファイヤの持ち主は巨万の富を得るかわりに一生を１人で過ごす。友人、恋人、家族すらすぐに持ち主の元を離れていくだろう。
|-
![Eng]
|No.078 :: Lonely Sapphire 
The owner of this sapphire will spend a lifetime very wealthy. Friends, Lover and Family will immediately move away from the owner.
|}
